feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence
feed.subtitle: SAP Manufacturing Integration and Intelligence Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error While Importing the TR using SOLMAN AND CTS+
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

ISSUE - we are trying to share the MII code from Development system to Quality system using CTS+ and Solman but While sharing the code, system is throwing RC-8 error.

while checking the logs we are getting below error "TransportEntity (ID:000D3AC318771EEE9AB7080E6FFD685D) status set to 'ERROR'."

Can you please help us with some pointers where we can check this transport entity in the system so we can check this issue.

Please note that we are using CTS+ in our landscape.

SAP MII version - 15.5.0.26

Quick response will be appreciated.

Regards,

Ankit Gupta

entry.title: SAP PCo Agent Error with RSLinx
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In one of our customers, we use SAP PCo (Version 15.5) to connect with RSLinx OPC Server DA 2.05A.

We set source system's browsing mode to Relative Path as said in the installation document and we can see all the tags in Aliases tab. (If we set browsing mode to Absolute Path, we cannot see any tag in Aliases Tab)

After that, we created an Agent and selected SAP MII Query Server with Port Number 9000 under Servers tab.

Since I will run some PCo Queries in MII side read/write tag values.

When I start this Agent, it turns red with Interrupted icon with the following error message.

"WCF Service is faulted. The configured cache mode is not allowed with Browsing Mode RelativePath"

Is there anyone who faced with this problem?

Or is there anyone who can help us?

Thanx,

Aykut

entry.title: HS bags entered incorrect by the client
entry.content:
Hi user has wrongly entered the HS bags as 376 instead of 350

How i can correct that in SAP MIII

entry.title: Error in reading PCo Management WSDL in MII
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to connect a weighing scale with SAP MII through PCo. We just wanted to read the scale tag value on a need basis.

SAP MII Version: 15.3

SAP PCo Version: 15.5.4.25

We were able to see the PCo WSDL response through the browser. But we are getting the following error when tried to create PCo Data Connector in MII.

Error in reading PCo Management WSDL

[EXCEPTION]

javax.wsdl.WSDLException: WSDLException (at /wsdl:definitions/wsdl:import): faultCode=OTHER_ERROR: Unable to resolve imported document at 'http://localhost:50050/PCoManagement?wsdl=wsdl0', relative to 'http:// pcoipaddress:50050/PCoManagement?wsdl': java.lang.Exception: Unable to load:http://localhost:50050/PCoManagement?wsdl=wsdl0:Connection refused

We were able to see the WSDL response in my machine.

Kindly help us to troubleshoot this issue.

Thanks & Regards,

Surender kamaraj.

entry.title: IDOCs are showing in SAP MII Message Monitor but not in the SAP MII Queue Monitor
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

As in title, we can't see IDOCs that coming to our MII DEV server on Queue Monitor (SAP ME ERP Integration -> Monitoring -> Queue Monitor - Standard).

But we can see them in Message Monitor (SAP ME ERP Integration -> Monitoring -> SAP MII Message Monitor).

In my little research on community forum, I've found out the problem is on message processing rules (SAP ME ERP Integration -> SAP MII Configuration-> Processing Rule Editor). I've created a IDoc listener as in below ;

I've created the scheduled jobs also, it works without an error.

In our MII Prod server we can get the IDOC messages, so when I compare it to the DEV server one difference sets them apart ; (Category : SAPMEINT_INBOUND_QUEUE)

But it is XMIIIDOC06 in SAP DEV side.

Their Message Process Rules are identical in DEV and PROD. But somehow in Message monitor, their categories are different.

How can I control or repair SAPMEINT_INBOUND_QUEUE ? Or this " IDOCs not in queue monitor" problem is because of something that I've missed ?

Thanks advance,

Alper

entry.title: pending iDoc count dashboard is increasing and multiple lock entries up to 2000
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are having an issue with the MII side wherein the processing of iDocs takes very slowly. The picture below shows the iDoc count dashboard wherein it started increasing from 11:03am onwards and iDoc is slowly clearing in the side of the graph.We were having multiple lock entries which exceeded 2000+ and upon checking in SM13, there are no any update requests. Also, we performed checks on RFC connection from MII to the ECC and connection test is ok. We also checked background processing jobs and there were none and most of it were finished already. We wanted to know what other issues which might be causing this iDoc issue to slowly drop the processing rate and even if deleting manually the Sm12 lock entries, it keeps on coming back and increasing.

Thank you in advance for the support.

entry.title: How to validate active monitoring setup in SAP PCo
entry.content:
Dear Folks,

We are using SAP PCo 15.5.4.25.

We have an agent 'WinCC Agent' in SAP PCo and we are trying to enable active monitoring for this agent.

Opened PCoRemoteClient, Clicked on 'Enable Active Monitoring' and performed all necessary configurations in 'SAP MII Alert Configuration' popup window as shown below.

Do we need to do perform any other configuration to start active monitoring service?.

How can we validate if the configuration is ok and active monitoring for the agent got enabled?

Not able to see any log for the transaction we used to call from active monitoring.

Kindly help me with the details on how to validate active monitoring for the agent.

Thanks & Regards,

Surender Kamaraj.

entry.title: Bad Certificate Error-PCO UA Source
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have PCO 15.5 and Kelpware server. I configured the PCO with server endpoint configuration on Session Tab as suggested by vendor.

And Selected the Certificate which by default available under Security Tab - Personnel folder.

But while testing the connection, it returned the Bad Certificate Error .

I have attached the error screen shot and Session Tab Configuration, pls help to resolve this issue.

endpoint.png

error-pco.png

entry.title: SAOP Web Service: Cannot initialize class because prior initialization attempt failed.
entry.content:
We are attempting to consume an Active Directory Web Service via the Web Service Action Block in the SAP MII Transaction. We can access the Active Directory Web Service WSDL in the browser, but MII returns the following error.

Anyone come across this issue and how we can address it?

Thanks,

Nikhil Naik

entry.title: Not able to add the Tags in PCO Agent instance
entry.content:
agentinstance.pngHi Everyone,

I have Configured the PCO 15.5 and established the connection successfully with Kepware server.

But here while adding tags on subscriptionItems tab, Add option is disabled. But Search option is enabled and I am able to browse all the Tags but Add button got disabled.

Can Someone pls guide me regarding this.

Regards,

Bikshapati.

entry.title: Share an Existing MII Project
entry.content:
Hi folks,

We've successfully integrated our MII systems with NWDI by following the official documents.

Now we are able to create or share an existing project into NWDI without any issues.

But when we try to import a shared project from another MII system (for ex. QA) using Source Control -> Import Project menu, an error message appears as shown below:
"Cannot create project; check log for error details Cannot create project com.domain.DCNAME; it already exists"

Note that we face this issue only if the project already exists in the target MII system.

Maybe a workaround would be to delete the existing local project first, but that would also delete the data, so we don't want to do it that way. MDOs are present in all 3 systems (DEV,QA,PROD) with different data.

Is there a way to replace the existing project with source control without deleting it first (QA, PROD)?

Thanks and Regards,
Umut

entry.title: what is after 999999...................
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

just to understand better, if MII transaction manager ID are reached to number 999,999,999 then what will happen afterwards?

* Will MII stop working or logging any new transaction.

or how to increase the Transaction ID count, or reset it.

Any comment or hints will be appreciated.

Regards,

Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Change DB from OEE DB to Hana DB to save all data coming from Erp on MII
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I recently installed a new MII sandbox. Most of the settings are completed. I run the wizards. Basis gave Hana DB setup on the same server for MII tables. But when I created and sent IDocs, I realized the records were saved in the Oee database, not in the Hana DB. I went to the Nwa application resource entered the JraFactory source information of Hana and saved it, but it did not solve. I did the installation according to the Sap Oee CTC guide, there was no Hana DB information there. Most of them entered ERP and NWA information.

I think it will be solved with Wizards. I would be happy for you to express your opinions on this subject.

Best regards,

Emre Yoldas

entry.title: Display custom message on SAP ME(Maufacturing Execution) home screen after login
entry.content:
Hi

If there is server downtime planned then I'm storing the start and end date of downtime in custom table. After login to SAP ME(SAP Manufacturing Execution) home screen, I want to display server downtime alert message on SAP ME homescreen 24 hours prior to planned downtime. Please let me know, if it is possible to display customized messages on home screen in SAP ME?

Thanks in advance.

Tejaswini 🙂

#SAPME

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE SQL query displayed as a number
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have got fixed sql query prepared in SAP MII 15.4.1.43. This query is fetching data for one specyfic day. I have 3 colums. First one is timestamp, second is sfc, third is quantity. I would like to use this simple query is SAP MII SSCE. Idea is to display this query as a single number which would be a sum of quantity column. Is it possible? Or schould I create baseKPI for that?

entry.title: Not able to call getDateValue() from DateTimePicker Class in SAPUI5
entry.content:
I have a View file that uses the DateTimePicker Class.

In controller, I am not able to call the getDateValue() method to get the date time from the view when it is selected. It is showing undefined. 

but in the parent class DatePicker, the getDateValue() method is available. So why can't I directly use this method in the DateTimePicker class since DateTimePicker already extends the DatePicker class. Or do I have to call the super constructor for this in the controller code? (Can you show how). 

(I am getting this error in SAPUI5 v1.60 which comes along with SAP MII v15.3)

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE Can't open configure display parameters window
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a problem with my MDO in SAP MII SSCE. When I drag and drop it to the layout, change visualisation type to grid, I want to add some display parameters. For example:

I open configure display parameters window (it is hard to open at first time, I have to click on icon few times) and choose intrested options (excatlly 24 options), set them and close that window to check if visulisation is ok for me. if not i want to go back to configuration display parameters window, but i can't open it. I just click icon and nothing happend. 

The only option is to delete my MDO from layout and add new one, because this window works only once. There is no problem with odher configuratin windows.   

 

Can you help with that? My sap MII version is 15.4.1.43.

entry.title: Session attribute set to false in SAP PCO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a problem with PCo creating multiple sessions in MII. Every time that PCo sends a notification, a session is created. we have very huge number of session created at SAP MII side whenever there is any notification set from PCO side.

 

My question is.. is this behavior normal in PCo? (creating a session and not closing it every time a notification is sent to MII) or there is any configuration to set the session attribute while calling the MII webservice (WSDL) in PCO. 

we are using SAP PCO 15.5.1.5 version. 

got this link - Pco 2.3 creating multiple sessions in MII - SAP Community but looks like its an old post and not able to see the attribute also.

Quick response is appreciated.

 

Regards,

Ankit Gupta

entry.title: SAP MII SSCE How add fixed filter to grid table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone tell me how can I set fixed filter for grid tabel in SAP SSCE?

For example I have a table with two columns. I would like to choose only some of the data from set depends of first column. Example:

Table with two columns. First is column with numbers, second is with characters

1 A

2 B

3 C

4 D

 

I want choose only these rows with 2 nad 3 value in column with numbers. Output should look like:

2 B

3 C

 

This should be fixed and people who will use that dashboard can't change it. I use MDO as a data provider for this grid table.

entry.title: Not able to open MII Transaction link in my windows PC, net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)
entry.content:
I am trying to read an MII Transaction through web service from my PC and I am getting the cors error. I am using ajax call for this. This I am trying to monitor the Dev server availability. I am passing the login username and password through the IllumLoginName and IllumLoginPassword and the link runs fine, I get this JSON output when I run this link directly in a browser. 

 

Also, I can open the link using window.open() and it opens fine. 

But when using the link in an ajax call, even with crossDomain:true,,, it returns this error. 

Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:5501' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.

POST https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22 net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)

Is there any way to make it work? or are there any other solutions?
